title: Luffy Refuses to Let Laboon Die
description: On pages 15–18, luffy refuses to let laboon die as crocus explains Laboon’s long vigil and the tragedy behind the whale’s attacks on the Red Line.
scene: Luffy Refuses to Let Laboon Die. Crocus explains Laboon’s long vigil and the tragedy behind the whale’s attacks on the Red Line. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: Don't worry about him. He won't die!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luefy, what do you think you are doing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But we still don't know the result of this fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So we have to fight again in the future.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We will travel around Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And we will come back to see you again.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on luffy refuses to let laboon die. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
